notes: v0.16.70 — Node Mode Lab v2: 7 class-agnostic prototypes. Path A speed-normalization (every class moves at the SAME base speed in these modes), HP and ability stay class-unique so the modes are fair from SHARD to BASTION. (1) PARRY GATE — gates cycle RED → AMBER → WHITE; hit SPACE on WHITE to reflect, miss = explode on contact. (2) POWER NODES — 3 rotating capture points to stand on, centre turret fires kicks on the downbeat. (3) RHYTHM PUNCH — 4 armoured targets that are invulnerable except for a beat-synced WEAK PHASE; DPS only matters when the timing lines up. (4) CORE DEFENCE — arena shrinks, intercept enemies before they touch the centre core. (5) CHAIN LINKS — destroy 6 hex nodes in numeric order; wrong target = damage. (6) CONVOY ESCORT — body-block hazards aimed at a slow ally crossing the arena. (7) OVERLOAD GRID — heat 4 generators with shots until they detonate and clear hazard waves. Keys: 1..7 = mode, D = cycle difficulty (EASY/MED/HARD/BRUTAL), R = reset. 128 BPM pulse visible top-right. Pick favourites and I port them into the real Rift runtime. Windows only.
